hooks.command: pnpm run format >/tmp/openwiki-format.log 2>&1; pnpm run lint >/tmp/openwiki-lint.log 2>&1; if ! pnpm run format:check >/tmp/openwiki-format-check.log 2>&1 || ! pnpm run lint:check >/tmp/openwiki-lint-check.log 2>&1; then cat /tmp/openwiki-format-check.log /tmp/openwiki-lint-check.log >&2; exit 2; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running format and lint before finishing...
